title: Brandon Sanderson - Mistborn 01 - The Final Empire
description:
Book Description
================
Brandon Sanderson, fantasy's newest master tale spinner, author of the 
acclaimed debut Elantris, dares to turn 
a genre on its head by asking a simple question: What if the hero of
